name: Keyboard Hum and Rocket Dreams
description:
You step into the Portland branch of Crafton Jennings Paper Company Inc., where sunlight floods tall windows and keyboards hum. Today feels ordinary, but it isn’t.

Mike Grady, your larger-than-life branch manager, is over the moon about humanity’s first manned mission to Mars. His booming voice, dramatic flair, and impromptu singing draw admiration and eye rolls alike. Gary and Josh hang on every word while Chloe sighs at his theatrics.

Around you, the office hums with motion: Susan taps her pen, Kyle and Jose discuss logistics, Angela plans the party, and Tara observes quietly. Dillon from the warehouse warns of staff shortages, but Mike waves him off, confident he’ll handle it all.

You feel the tension between mundane tasks and grand ambition. Phones ring, spreadsheets await, and every conversation, keystroke, and gesture weaves the office’s tapestry. At Crafton Jennings Portland, the ordinary becomes unpredictable, and you never know what might happen next.

This series was influenced by the TV show The Office.

You can find the complete Cubicles & Chaos series via the link below 🔗📚

creator: ScreamingWolf
